parameters.query: SELECT * FROM supplier_invoices_failures WHERE retry_count <= 3 ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 50;

nodes.name: 🔍 Query — Fetch Pending Retries
nodes.notes: Fetches all failed invoices with retry_count < 3. Max 50 per run to avoid overloading. Orders by created_at so oldest failures are retried first.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route — Has Retries or Empty
nodes.notes: If no pending retries found, stop workflow. Otherwise proceed to re-attempt inserts.

nodes.name: 🔄 Prepare — Parse & Validate Retry
nodes.notes: Parses raw_payload JSONB back into structured fields. Checks if all required fields are present for a re-insert attempt. Increments retry_count.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route — Retryable or Exhausted
nodes.notes: Routes rows that have all required fields to re-insert attempt. Rows missing critical fields go to exhausted path.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO supplier_invoices (
  invoice_number, supplier_number, supplier_name, department,
  amount_excl_vat, vat, amount_incl_vat, invoice_date,
  source_file_name, source_hash, ingest_timestamp,
  status, validation_notes
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.invoice_number }}',
  '{{ $json.supplier_number }}',
  '{{ $json.supplier_name }}',
  '{{ $json.department }}',
  {{ $json.amount_excl_vat }},
  {{ $json.vat }},
  {{ $json.amount_incl_vat }},
  '{{ $json.invoice_date }}',
  {{ $json.source_file_name ? `'${$json.source_file_name}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.source_hash ? `'${$json.source_hash}'` : 'NULL' }},
  NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg',
  'inserted',
  'Inserted on retry #{{ $json.retry_count }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (supplier_number, invoice_number) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, invoice_number, supplier_number, status;

nodes.name: 💾 Re-insert — supplier_invoices
nodes.notes: Attempts to re-insert the failed row into supplier_invoices. Uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING to safely handle any duplicates. RETURNING confirms successful insert.

parameters.query:
UPDATE supplier_invoices_failures
SET
  retry_count = {{ $json.retry_count }},
  last_retry = NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg',
  validation_notes = 'Max retries (3) reached — missing required fields, manual intervention required: {{ $json.validation_notes }}'
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
RETURNING id, invoice_number, retry_count;

nodes.name: 📝 Update — Mark Exhausted
nodes.notes: For rows that cannot be retried (missing required fields), marks them as exhausted with a clear message for manual review.

nodes.name: 📊 Aggregate — Retry Metrics
nodes.notes: Aggregates results from all retry branches. Counts re-inserted, updated, and exhausted rows. Builds data for the retry summary email.

parameters.jsCode:
// ============================================================ // NODE: Build Retry Email // PURPOSE: Generate HTML email summarizing retry run results. // ============================================================ const m = $input.first().json; const { reinsertedCount, updatedCount, exhaustedCount, exhaustedRows, ingestTime } = m; const headerColor = exhaustedCount > 0 ? '#c0392b' : (reinsertedCount > 0 ? '#27ae60' : '#3498db'); const status = exhaustedCount > 0 ? 'ACTION REQUIRED' : (reinsertedCount > 0 ? 'RETRIES SUCCESSFUL' : 'RETRIES ATTEMPTED'); let exhaustedTableHTML = ''; if (exhaustedRows && exhaustedRows.length > 0) { const rowsHTML = exhaustedRows.map(r => ` ${r.invoice_number} EXHAUSTED (${r.retry_count}/3) `).join(''); exhaustedTableHTML = `

🚨 Requires Manual Intervention (${exhaustedRows.length})

${rowsHTML}
Invoice # Status
`; } const emailHTML = `

🔄 Invoice Retry Pipeline Report

${status}

🕐 Run Time ${ingestTime}

📊 Retry Summary

${reinsertedCount}
✅ RE-INSERTED
${updatedCount}
🔄 RETRY UPDATED
${exhaustedCount}
🚨 EXHAUSTED
${exhaustedTableHTML || '

✅ No invoices have exhausted their retry attempts.

'}

Generated by Supplier Invoice Retry Pipeline · n8n Automation · Africa/Johannesburg

View Workflow in n8n

`; const subject = `Invoice Retry: ${reinsertedCount} re-inserted, ${exhaustedCount} exhausted — ${ingestTime}`; return [{ json: { emailSubject: subject, emailHTML, ...m } }];

nodes.name: ✉️ Build — Retry Email Body
nodes.notes: Builds a professional HTML email summarizing the retry run. Color coded: green for success, red for exhausted rows requiring manual intervention.

nodes.name: 📧 Send — Retry Alert Email
nodes.notes: Sends retry summary email. Update 'Send To' with your email address. Only sends if there were rows to retry — no noise emails on empty runs.

parameters.query:
UPDATE supplier_invoices_failures
SET
  retry_count = {{ $json.retry_count }},
  last_retry = NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg',
  validation_notes = CASE
    WHEN {{ $json.retry_count }} >= 3 
    THEN 'Max retries (3) reached — manual intervention required'
    ELSE 'Retry #{{ $json.retry_count }} failed — will retry again'
  END
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
RETURNING id, invoice_number, retry_count;

parameters.content:
⏰ RETRY TRIGGER
Runs automatically every 6 hours via Schedule trigger.
Can also be triggered manually via "Execute workflow".

Fetches rows from supplier_invoices_failures 
WHERE retry_count <= 3
ORDER BY created_at ASC (oldest first)
LIMIT 50 per run.

⚙️ RETRY LOGIC
Parses raw_payload JSONB back into structured fields.
Increments retry_count by 1.

can_retry = true if:
- All required fields present AND
- retry_count <= MAX_RETRIES (3)

can_retry = false → Mark Exhausted
can_retry = true  → Attempt Re-insert

💾 RETRY OUTCOMES
Success → Delete row from supplier_invoices_failures → email "re-inserted"
Exhausted (retry_count > 3) → Mark exhausted, keep in failures → email "ACTION REQUIRED"
Failed → Increment retry_count, last_retry timestamp → retry again next run

Email sent after every run regardless of outcome.
Single email guaranteed — Aggregate reads from Delete node only.

nodes.name: ⏰ Schedule — Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours to retry failed invoice inserts. Picks up any rows in supplier_invoices_failures where retry_count < 3.
